policyName: Data Classification Policy — IT Act 2000 & DPDP Act 2023

CRITICAL.description: PII, biometric data, passwords, encryption keys, case evidence chain-of-custody

handling.encryption: AES-256-GCM at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit
handling.access: Strict RBAC — only assigned investigators and administrators
handling.retention: As per court order or case closure + 7 years
handling.masking: Full masking in logs and analytics

HIGH.description: Forensic evidence, device images, dark web intelligence, internal investigation reports

handling.encryption: AES-256-GCM at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit

MEDIUM.description: User metadata (non-PII), operational logs, threat intel indicators (IOCs)

handling.encryption: AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.2+ in transit
handling.access: Role-based with approval for bulk export

LOW.description: Public threat feeds, anonymized statistics, documentation
